Records.description: Two-loop five-point offshell pentabox integral with one massless and four massive propagators (mass $m$), three massive external legs, evaluated in $6-2\varepsilon$ dimensions (finite in $\varepsilon$). Prefactor $\Gamma(2+2\varepsilon)$ divided out to match the configuration of Borinsky et al. (arXiv:2302.08955). Result given through $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^4)$ at $p_0^2=0$, $p_1^2=p_2^2=p_3^2=m^2=1/2$ with 7 independent scales.

QCD-like two-loop five-point Feynman diagram in $D = 6 - 2\varepsilon$ dimensions, with four gluon (massless) and four quark (mass $m$) internal propagators alternating around the graph. External legs $p_0$ massless, $p_1, p_2, p_3$ on-shell at $m^2$, and $p_4$ off-shell by momentum conservation. Evaluated up to $\varepsilon^4$ with $N=1\mathrm{e}8$ tropical samples, verified against pySecDec despite the exceptional kinematic configuration.
Records.familyName: QCD-like two-loop five-point diagram (quark-gluon alternating propagators)
